Hero.name: Omri Meron – Fine Art and Commercial Photographer
Hero.bio: Fine Art and Commercial Photographer, SVA New York graduate. Driven by a deep understanding of an artist's needs and backed by extensive experience with leading clients locally and worldwide

Gallery.empty: No pieces in this category yet.

Footer.tagline: Fine-art reproduction photography for artists and galleries.

Contact.intro: I offer precise and meticulous artwork reproduction photography (at my Tel Aviv studio or on-site at your location). The process utilizes tethered shooting directly to a computer for real-time viewing, and includes final digital retouching and cleaning to ensure absolute fidelity to the original piece.
